description: 像素传送带清板益智游戏 - 传送带机制和攻击规则验证

assertions.description: 游戏启动：无控制台错误，标题页正常显示
主循环可玩：点击开始 → 进入游戏 → 派出小猪 → 观察移动

setup.js: const pig = window.gameState && window.gameState.waitingSlots && window.gameState.waitingSlots[0]; if (pig) { window.__testPig = pig; }

assertions.description: 硬约束：每次攻击只处理一个目标块

setup.js: window.__beforeBlocks = window.gameState && window.gameState.blocks ? window.gameState.blocks.filter(b => b.durability > 0).length : -1; if (window.gameState && window.gameState.conveyorPigs) { const pig = window.gameState.conveyorPigs[0]; if (pig) { window.__pigValueBefore = pig.value; } }

window.__afterBlocks = window.gameState && window.gameState.blocks ? window.gameState.blocks.filter(b => b.durability > 0).length : -1; window.__blocksChanged = window.__beforeBlocks >= 0 && window.__afterBlocks >= 0 && (window.__beforeBlocks - window.__afterBlocks) <= 1;

assertions.description: 硬约束：攻击基于位置，非全屏索敌

setup.js: window.__hasPositionBased = typeof window.getFirstBlockInDirection === 'function' || (window.gameState && window.gameState.conveyorPigs && window.gameState.conveyorPigs.some(p => p.position !== undefined));

assertions.description: 等待槽回收：小猪未耗尽返回等待槽

setup.js: window.__waitingAfter = window.gameState && window.gameState.waitingSlots ? window.gameState.waitingSlots.length : 0; window.__recycled = window.__waitingAfter >= window.__waitingBefore;

assertions.description: 胜负条件：棋盘清空胜利，资源耗尽失败

setup.js: window.__checkResult = function() { const gs = window.gameState; if (!gs) return 'unknown'; if (gs.phase === 'win') return 'win'; if (gs.phase === 'lose') return 'lose'; const blocks = gs.blocks || []; const remaining = blocks.filter(b => b.durability > 0).length; if (remaining === 0 && gs.phase !== 'playing') return 'win'; return 'playing'; }; window.__result = window.__checkResult();

assertions.description: 关卡递进：验证关卡配置正确

setup.js: window.__levelValid = window.gameState && typeof window.gameState.currentLevel === 'number' && window.gameState.currentLevel >= 1 && window.gameState.currentLevel <= 3;

assertions.description: 硬约束：禁止穿透攻击，攻击只针对第一个目标块
传送带存在：验证传送带容量和结构
颜色匹配机制：小猪和目标块有颜色属性

setup.js: const gs = window.gameState; window.__hasColors = gs && ( (gs.waitingSlots && gs.waitingSlots.some(p => p.color)) || (gs.blocks && gs.blocks.some(b => b.color)) );
